mapper.insert: INSERT INTO academic_year (year, semester, start_date, end_date, selection_start, selection_end, status) VALUES (#{year}, #{semester}, #{start_date}, #{end_date}, #{selection_start}, #{selection_end}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE academic_year SET year = #{year}, semester = #{semester}, start_date = #{start_date}, end_date = #{end_date}, selection_start = #{selection_start}, selection_end = #{selection_end}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM academic_year WHERE status = 1 LIMIT 1
